subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始め、両方の親指で小指の糸を上から親指に巻き付けるように取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the string looped on both thumbs and little fingers. With both thumbs, move over and pick down the little-finger strings, winding them onto the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両方の親指で、小指の手前側の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両方の小指で、親指の向こう側の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up from below the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: それぞれの中指で、手のひらにかかっている下側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With each middle finger, pick up from below the lower palm string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指同士にかかっている上の糸を、下の糸を残したまま外します。小指も同様に外してゴムの完成です
subtitle.en: Release the upper string that runs between the thumbs, keeping the lower one in place. Do the same with the little fingers, and this completes the elastic band figure.
